name: Aang's Defense
oracle_text:
Target blocking creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn.
Draw a card.
flavor_text:
"I guess you've never fought an Airbender before."
—Aang

name: Aardvark Sloth
oracle_text: Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
flavor_text: Even Firebenders hate fire ants, so the Sun Warriors ensure the sloths are free to eat their fill.

name: Acrobatic Leap
oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+3 and gains flying until end of turn. Untap it.
flavor_text: Once Aang and The Blue Spirit were under attack, it was unclear which one was rescuing the other.

name: Brainstorm
oracle_text: Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.
flavor_text:
"Now I get it. Something awful happened on that day. I don't know what, but I do know why. Firebenders lose their bending during a solar eclipse!"
—Sokka

name: Capital Guard
flavor_text: Fire Nation guards rely more on fear than fire.

name: Cathartic Reunion
oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard two cards.
Draw three cards.
flavor_text:
"I was never angry with you. I was sad, because I was afraid you'd lost your way."
—Iroh

name: Cloudshift
oracle_text: Exile target creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under your control.
flavor_text:
"Clouds are made of water and air, so between the two of us, we ought to be able to bend them into any shape we want."
—Aang

name: Consider
oracle_text:
Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
Draw a card.
flavor_text:
"Hmm. Delectable tea, or deadly poison?"
—Iroh

name: Dai Li Censor
oracle_text: {1}, Sacrifice another creature: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.
flavor_text: The Dai Li are the cultural authority of Ba Sing Se and guardians of all Earth Kingdom traditions.

name: Deer-Dog
oracle_text: First strike (This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
flavor_text: A predator once abundant in the dunes of ages past, now most commonly found as pets napping in the shady areas of the Misty Palms Oasis.

name: Deny Entry
oracle_text: Counter target creature spell. Draw a card, then discard a card.
flavor_text: Her judgment was swift and final... and rather rude.

name: Diresight
oracle_text: Surveil 2, then draw two cards. You lose 2 life. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)
flavor_text: Avatar Roku showed Aang the truth behind Sozin's Comet.

name: Dragon Moose
oracle_text: Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)
flavor_text: Noble passengers require noble transportation.

name: Dramatic Reversal
oracle_text: Untap all nonland permanents you control.
flavor_text:
"I beat you all before and I'll do it again!"
—Toph

name: Elephant-Rat
oracle_text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
flavor_text:
"The rats that scurried across the floor of my cage were nothing more than skins filled with liquid."
—Hama

name: Explore
oracle_text:
You may play an additional land this turn.
Draw a card.
flavor_text: Sky bison know no boundaries by land or sea, for the sky above them is boundless.

name: Explosive Shot
oracle_text: Explosive Shot deals 4 damage to target creature.
flavor_text:
"You're not to blow the dam until I give the signal."
—Jet

name: Feed the Swarm
oracle_text: Destroy target creature or enchantment an opponent controls. You lose life equal to that permanent's mana value.
flavor_text: Buzzard-wasps single-mindedly scour the Si Wong Desert in search of dead or dying prey.

name: Fire Nation Ambushers
oracle_text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
flavor_text: "Hey! That kid's the Avatar!"

name: Fire Nation Soldier
oracle_text: Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)
flavor_text: Fire Nation soldiers spread like wildfire during the Hundred Year War.

name: Fists of Flame
oracle_text: Draw a card. Until end of turn, target creature gains trample and gets +1/+0 for each card you've drawn this turn. (A creature with trample can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
flavor_text: Zuko's rage fueled his firebending, making him one of the fiercest in the Fire Nation.

name: Flying Dolphin-Fish
oracle_text: Flying (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.)
flavor_text: Schools of dolphin-fish follow Fire Nation vessels, hoping to score an easy meal from broken nets.

name: Freedom Fighter Recruit
oracle_text: Freedom Fighter Recruit's power is equal to the number of creatures you control.
flavor_text: Generations of war created lost children in every nation, with no loyalty to anyone but each other.

name: Frog-Squirrels
oracle_text: Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)
flavor_text: Some of the mysterious croaking and chittering heard in the Foggy Swamp can be traced back to frog-squirrels, who hop along the canopy and snack on giant insects.

name: Giant Fly
oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever you sacrifice another permanent, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
flavor_text: Large carcasses lead to large flies. Large flies lead to large problems.

name: Gilacorn
oracle_text: Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
flavor_text: For any creature to survive in the Si Wong Desert, they must be hardworking, extremely opportunistic, or both.

name: Hippo-Cows
oracle_text: Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player it's attacking.)
flavor_text: While hippo-cows are relatively docile, wise farmers still prefer to keep a safe distance.

name: Inspired Insurgent
oracle_text: {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
flavor_text: Thanks to Katara, the coal meant to fuel enemy ships instead fueled the prisoners' liberation.

name: Kindly Customer
oracle_text: When this creature enters, draw a card.
flavor_text:
"I've seen that girl in here quite a lot. Seems to me she has quite a little crush on you."
—Iroh, to Zuko

name: Koala-Sheep
oracle_text: When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.
flavor_text: Koala-sheep can fall asleep anywhere, and often do.

name: Komodo Rhino
oracle_text: Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player it's attacking.)
flavor_text: The Komodo Rhino embodies the spirit of Fire Nation soldiers. They are aggressive, disciplined, and feared.

name: Kyoshi Warrior Guard
flavor_text: Kyoshi Warrior drills are designed to encourage individual discipline as well as uncompromising trust in their fellow warriors.

name: Many Partings
oracle_text: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
flavor_text: "No! My cabbages!"

name: Mechanical Glider
oracle_text:
When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control.
Equipped creature has flying. (It can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.)
Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

name: Path to Redemption
oracle_text:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature can't attack or block.
{5}, Sacrifice this Aura: Exile enchanted creature. Create a 1/1 white Ally creature token. Activate only during your turn.
flavor_text: "You can't always see the light at the end of the tunnel, but if you just keep moving you will come to a better place."

name: Purple Pentapus
oracle_text:
When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
{2}{B}, Tap an untapped creature you control: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
flavor_text: Useful for whipping up a fictional plague in a pinch.

name: Razor Rings
oracle_text: Razor Rings deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. You gain life equal to the excess damage dealt this way.
flavor_text:
"There's someone in there! He's bending the vines!"
—Sokka

name: Run Amok
oracle_text: Target attacking creature gets +3/+3 and gains trample until end of turn.
flavor_text: Even without its rider, a Komodo Rhino will cause its fair share of destruction— unaided and unprompted.

name: Sledding Otter-Penguin
oracle_text: {3}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
flavor_text: Otter-penguins often play with humans, carrying them on their backs as they sled down snowy embankments.

name: Sokka's Sword Training
oracle_text:
Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.
Create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
flavor_text:
"The first thing you must learn is that your weapon is an extension of yourself. You must think of it as another part of your own body."
—Master Piandao

name: Stand United
oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If it's an Ally, scry 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)
flavor_text:
"It's not about strength. Our technique is about using your opponent's force against them."
—Suki

name: The Art of Tea
oracle_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control. Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
flavor_text:
"The secret ingredient is love."
—Iroh

name: Thriving Bluff
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than red.
{T}: Add {R} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: Makapu Village was a highly desirable place to live and farm. Though the local fortune teller claimed the volcano was dormant, the Avatar thought otherwise.

name: Thriving Grove
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than green.
{T}: Add {G} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: With the Avatar's aid, the Ba Sing Se Zoo became a safe haven for animals across the four nations.

name: Thriving Heath
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than white.
{T}: Add {W} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: Outside the sanctuary of Ba Sing Se's walls, humble Earth Kingdom villages hope to stave off the news of war for just one more day.

name: Thriving Isle
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than blue.
{T}: Add {U} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text:
"Ember Island gives everyone a clean slate. Ember Island reveals the true you."
—Lo and Li

name: Thriving Moor
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than black.
{T}: Add {B} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text:
"In the Swamp, we see visions of people we've lost, people we've loved, folks we think are gone."
—Нuu

name: Toucan-Puffin
oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
flavor_text: Though Sokka believed the toucan-puffins were gathering intel for the enemy, it's far more likely they were simply gathering nesting for their mates.

name: Tundra Wall
oracle_text: Defender (This creature can't attack.)
flavor_text: Wolf Cove's snow fort doubles as Sokka's watchtower and a playground for Water Tribe children.

name: Turtle-Seals
oracle_text: Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
flavor_text: Their underwater ice caves weave throughout the north pole, providing traversal for those willing to brave the cold.

name: Unagi's Spray
oracle_text: Target creature gets -4/-0 until end of turn. If you control a Fish, Octopus, Otter, Seal, Serpent, or Whale, draw a card.
flavor_text: Capable of both blasting ships to pieces and humbling showboating Avatars.

name: Warship Scout
flavor_text: "For the glory of the Fire Nation!"

name: Wolf Cove Villager
oracle_text: This creature enters tapped.
flavor_text: Life is simply slower in the snow. Nobody knows that better than the villagers of Wolf Cove.

name: Zuko's Offense
oracle_text: Zuko's Offense deals 2 damage to any target.
flavor_text:
"Looks like I underestimated you."
—Zuko
